name: StarCoder2 3B
archDisplay: Transformer decoder, grouped-query + sliding-window attention (4K window/16K ctx), FIM; ServiceNow-trained
note: ServiceNow-trained 3B StarCoder2 for laptop/edge code generation; outperforms original 15B StarCoder on many benchmarks.

results.notes: HumanEval+ pass@1 = 27.4, taken verbatim from the model-index metadata block in the official HF model card README (fetched raw).

RepoBench v1.1 exact match (EM), averaged across the Python and Java splits reported in Table 17 of the StarCoder2 & The Stack v2 paper (Lozhkov et al., 2024): Python EM 32.47, Java EM 38.46. Uniform official-implementation prompt construction per Liu et al. 2023b, evaluated by the StarCoder2/BigCode authors.

verificationNotes: Fetched HF model card: confirmed 3B params, 16K ctx, ServiceNow-trained, 17 languages, HumanEval 31.7/GSM8K(PAL) 27.7/DS-1000 25.0 verbatim. No changes.
